name: polish
description: Personal collection of curated, self-made, and adapted agent skills.

interface.shortDescription: Curated personal skills for agent workflows
interface.longDescription: Polish is a personal collection of curated, self-made, and adapted agent skills. It includes prompt rewriting, duplicate-file planning, pre-push risk review, and prefixed Superpowers workflows for brainstorming, test-driven development, systematic debugging, completion verification, and skill authoring.
defaultPrompt: Use prompt-polish to rewrite this prompt: ...
Rewrite this question for a better LLM answer.
Run before-git-push on my staged changes: PUSH or HOLD?
Use superpowers-brainstorming to design this change before implementation.
Use superpowers-systematic-debugging to investigate this failure.
Use superpowers-verification-before-completion before claiming this work is done.
